---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the situation or pain point. Who runs into it, and when?

## Proposed solution

What would make this better? A specific change, a new pattern, documentation, tooling.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you thought about solving this (and why they don't fit).

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits the blueprint's scope (security-hardened self-hosted Docker Compose)
- [ ] This respects existing standards in `docs/standards/`
- [ ] I've searched existing issues and discussions for duplicates
- [ ] For a new app: I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [app-setup-blueprint](../../docs/app-setup-blueprint.md) on the `docs` branch

## Additional context

Links to upstream projects, example configurations, related issues.
